signals.reasoning: BTC still has the strongest raw long structure on the board with negative funding, trade-grade score, and trend-supported price/OI, but the live Fed-headline VETO still makes fresh chasing unattractive. Strong setup underneath, poor timing quality for a new entry.
ETH still carries some negative-funding support, but the price/OI pattern is still short-covering-rally rather than clean continuation and crowding is elevated. Under VETO it remains watch-only.
SOL now also looks more like short-covering than clean trend continuation, which weakens it as a fresh long. Not a good chase under VETO.
HEMI is heavily crowded and very extended with strongly positive funding, but momentum is still running in the wrong direction for a clean short. Too dangerous to fade and too late to chase.
TST is still too crowded on the long side and the move no longer offers clean asymmetry in either direction. Hold only.

BIO has one of the strongest raw squeeze profiles on the board with deeply negative funding and a trade-grade score, but it is also already extended and the board is under VETO. It is a watchlist long, not a fresh recommendation.

VVV is one of the few names with an actually bearish mechanical read, and price/OI still fits a short-covering-rally profile rather than healthy upside continuation. This is only a reduced-confidence short lean, but it is one of the cleaner bearish ideas here.
MON is stable and mildly constructive, but not differentiated enough to justify action under a headline-driven veto. Watch-only.
ZEC remains too neutral and too low-energy to justify a fresh signal. It does not offer enough edge in either direction.
MERL still has constructive recovery structure, but it is already extended enough that the VETO makes the entry quality unattractive. Not a fresh buy here.

GRIFFAIN is the clearest bearish lean on the board with a strongly negative mechanical score and actual daily weakness versus the rest of the tape. It is still a thinner alt, so confidence stays moderate, but this is one of the better shorts available.
